name: Karbon Daily Triage Digest
description: Daily 8am digest pulling Karbon Triage summary and posting to Slack as a companion to the email triage workflow

parameters.url: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to list recent Triage items, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/Triage?createdToday=true__>

parameters.content:
## GOAL
Give a once-a-day check-in on the email triage workflow:

1. Every morning at 8am, pull a summary of Triage activity from Karbon
2. Post it to Slack so you have a quick overnight summary view

This is the companion workflow to "Email Triage to Karbon Project Assignment" -- that workflow does the real-time work, this one is the daily review layer.

## OUTCOME: Daily Digest
Every morning at 8am, this pulls a summary of todays Triage activity from Karbon and posts it to Slack.

Use this to spot-check accuracy weekly: are "high confidence" auto-links from the email triage workflow actually correct? Are "needs review" items following a pattern that could be tuned in that workflows AI prompt?

Before activating:
- Set the Karbon API URL + credential in "Get Karbon Triage Summary"
- Set the Slack channel ID in "Send Daily Digest"
- Attach your Slack credential

The raw summary JSON is included for now -- once Karbons Triage list endpoint shape is known, this can be formatted nicer (e.g. via an AI summarization step).
